assertions.title: S3 scenario — post-workout recovery arc visible at a glance

steps.expected: Recovery S3 range renders with workout marker, dip/recovery arcs, daily table progression, and insight narrative.
steps.observed: Recovery view loaded and rendered S3-like data; insight card and multi-metric sparklines were visible at initial view.

steps.expected: Visible marker label includes exact text '10K run' on Mon 24.
steps.observed: Visible UI text includes '10K run' (also 'workout'); table day headers render as Sun 22..Thu 26 in this seeded window, so strict 'Mon 24' wording is not directly matched.

steps.expected: Readiness dips to 42 and recovers to 82 by Thu 27.
steps.observed: Readiness row/sparkline shows 42 -> 61 -> 68 -> 82 -> 84 (Sun 22..Thu 26), so dip is present and recovery is visible; endpoint/end-day wording differs from strict assertion text.

steps.expected: HRV dips to 26 and recovers to 48.
steps.observed: HRV row/sparkline shows 26 -> 34 -> 40 -> 48 -> 50; dip and recovery are visible (48 appears before final day).

Readiness and HRV rows show 🔴 entries and later non-red/green entries, but no explicit 🟡 cells were rendered in row text/DOM classes (intermediate cells were neutral slate), so strict emoji progression was not met.
Insight text reads: 'Your readiness improved from 42 to 84 over 3 days, indicating a healthy recovery pattern.'

evidence.network: agent-browser request capture empty; fallback curl evidence: GET /api/views/recovery?start=2026-03-22&end=2026-03-26 -> 200 (see .../VAL-UIRCV-003-recovery-api-headers.txt and .../VAL-UIRCV-003-recovery-api-response.json)

assertions.issues: Partial contract match only: '10K run' is now visible and 3-day narrative is present, but strict clause wording mismatches remain (day/value wording drift and no explicit 🟡 stage in table progression).

frictions.description: agent-browser network capture returned no requests for this flow.
frictions.resolution: Used authenticated curl fallback to capture GET /api/views/recovery request/response artifacts.

summary: Retested 1 assertion (VAL-UIRCV-003): fail. Recovery arc and '10K run'/'3 days' cues are visible, but strict full contract wording was not fully satisfied due date/value wording drift and missing explicit 🟡 progression in daily table evidence.
